title: Issue with widths of instances of the same interface with different parameters

features.name: parameterized_interface_with_bits_typedef
features.description: Code should include a parameterized interface with a typedef that uses $bits() on interface signals
features.snippet: interface ifc #(parameter int width)(logic [width-1:0] b); logic [width-1:0] a; typedef logic[$bits(type(a))-1:0] type_t; endinterface

features.name: type_cast_in_always_comb_from_interface_typedef
features.description: Code should include a type cast expression inside an always_comb block that uses a typedef defined within an interface

features.name: multiple_interface_instances_different_params
features.description: Code should include multiple instances of the same parameterized interface with different parameter values where smaller width is declared first
features.snippet: logic [7:0] y; ifc #(.width(8)) y_ifc(y); logic [15:0] x; ifc #(.width(16)) x_ifc(x);
